title: Title 12: CONSERVATION §1 — Short title
text:
§1. Short title
This chapter may be known and cited as the "Soil and Water Conservation Districts Law."
[RR 1993, c. 1, §32 (COR).]
SECTION HISTORY
PL 1965, c. 190, §1 (AMD). RR 1993, c. 1, §32 (COR).
chapter: Chapter 1: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION DISTRICTS
